channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Two Dead, Several Injured in Shooting at Toronto Street Festival
item.description: At least two people have died and multiple others were injured in a shooting at a street festival in Toronto, according to police.

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham dies after brief and sudden illness
item.description: President Trump paid tribute to the late senator, who was reportedly scheduled for a Sunday interview.

item.title: U.S. conducts another round of retaliatory strikes on Iran, Pentagon says
item.description: U.S. forces carried out a third round of strikes on Iran this week in retaliation for an attack on a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham dies after sudden illness | Special Report
item.description: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham has died after a brief and sudden illness, his office confirmed. Carissa Lawson anchored this CBS News special report.
